title: Harla
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
The '''''Harla''''' was a [[Koros-Strohna]] used by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]].

==History==
In the early months of their [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], [[Drathul]] was [[Prefect/Legends|Prefect]] of the ''Harla''.

{{Ship-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
''Harla'' was also the name of a Japanese server—or "Galaxy"—in [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' {{Mo}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
